post_state_files.test_stringkit.py:
import pytest
from stringkit import reverse, count_vowels, title_case, starts_with_vowel


@pytest.mark.parametrize("s,expected", [
    ("hello", "olleh"),
    ("", ""),
    ("a", "a"),
    ("ab", "ba"),
    ("racecar", "racecar"),
    ("12345", "54321"),
    ("Hello World", "dlroW olleH"),
])
def test_reverse(s, expected):
    assert reverse(s) == expected


@pytest.mark.parametrize("text,expected", [
    ("hello", 2),
    ("", 0),
    ("HELLO", 2),
    ("aeiou", 5),
    ("AEIOU", 5),
    ("bcdfg", 0),
    ("Python is fun", 3),
    ("y", 0),
])
def test_count_vowels(text, expected):
    assert count_vowels(text) == expected


@pytest.mark.parametrize("text,expected", [
    ("hello world", "Hello World"),
    ("", ""),
    ("python", "Python"),
    ("HELLO WORLD", "Hello World"),
    ("hello   world", "Hello World"),
    ("  leading", "Leading"),
    ("a b c", "A B C"),
])
def test_title_case(text, expected):
    assert title_case(text) == expected


@pytest.mark.parametrize("word,expected", [
    ("apple", True),
    ("orange", True),
    ("Apple", True),
    ("Umbrella", True),
    ("banana", False),
    ("", False),
    ("xyz", False),
    ("I", True),
    ("e", True),
    ("z", False),
])
def test_starts_with_vowel(word, expected):
    assert starts_with_vowel(word) is expected


def test_starts_with_vowel_empty_returns_false():
    assert starts_with_vowel("") is False


def test_reverse_unicode():
    assert reverse("café") == "éfac"
